utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: (1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with named plans and a combined cost; this meets the requirement for both physical and mental and includes costs. (2) property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance with a named plan and cost; meets requirement. (3) travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance with a named plan and cost; meets requirement. (4) additional_services: field present but set to 'N/A' with a note; the format asks for any enhancement services with costs—if none, N/A is acceptable; however, it does not provide costs because there are no services, which is still a complete specification of the item (no services). (5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual cost breakdown; meets requirement. Therefore, all 5 items are included and sufficiently specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three specific products: PrimeCare Premium Plan for physical health at €200/month, PrimeCare Premium Plan for mental health at €130/month, PrimeHome Premium Coverage at €90/month, and EliteTravel Premium Plan at €110/month. I matched each named plan exactly to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings and extracted their ratings.
